name: hermes
notes: Skills and knowledge documents are copied from the main repository. Each skill may have its own runtime dependencies; check the individual SKILL.md files. Built-in capabilities: Skill Sync (Local mode) via `hermes skill-sync --help`; Loop Engineering with Sub-Agent orchestration (Fan-out/Fan-in), builder-checker pattern, 7 stop rules, tool-level isolation, L1/L2/L3 staged autonomy, and OpenClaw Gateway integration via `hermes loop --help`. v0.4.0 adds 9 UI/design skills in 5 layers: figma-reader (L1), ui-design-system (L1), ui-review-checklist (L1), style-dictionary-sync (L2), component-library-selector (L2), design-spec-skill-creator (L3), prototype-validator (L4), storybook-chromatic (L4), liquid-glass-builder (L5). See knowledge/ui-design-stack.md for the design rationale.
